case_title: HILLHAVEN CONVALESCENT CENTER VS HUGHES GLOVER H. ATTY-IN-FACT ANA SWANSON (DECEASE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,270.66 FILED BY HILLHAVEN CONVALESCENT CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT HUGHES GLOVER H. ATTY-IN-FACT ANA SWANSON (DECEASE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-08-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HUGHES GLOVER H. ATTY-IN-FACT ANA SWANSON (DECEASE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HILLHAVEN CONVALESCENT CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUGHES GLOVER H. ATTY-IN-FACT ANA SWANSON (DECEASE $4,270.66 PRINCIPAL, $29.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,299.66 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HILLHAVEN CONVALESCENT CENTER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HUGHES GLOVER H. ATTY-IN-FACT ANA SWANSON (DECEASE IT IS HEREBY ADJUDGED, ORDERED, & DECREED THAT THE JUDGMENT ENTERED ON MAY 8,1992 AGAINST DEFENDANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
